nasb.text: You have become guilty by the blood which you have shed, and defiled by your idols which you have made. Thus you have brought your day near and have come to your years; therefore I have made you a reproach to the nations and a mocking to all the lands.

esv.text: You have become guilty by the blood that you have shed, and defiled by the idols that you have made, and you have brought your days near, the appointed time of your years has come. Therefore I have made you a reproach to the nations, and a mockery to all the countries.

cnv.text: 因你流了人的血，你就有罪了；因你做了偶像，你就玷污了自己；這樣，你使你受罰的日子臨近，遭報的年日來到，我使你成為列國辱罵、列邦譏笑的對象。

ccb.text: 你既犯罪杀人、制造偶像玷污自己、自招审判，我要使你成为列国列邦侮辱和讥讽的对象。
